title: Mutant More Barebones
description: Simplifies the textures in Mutant More to match the Bare Bones resource pack!
body: ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E3oFpuW3/images/b39e27fdd11e61da85fd2d9dbcecfaf826f2e337.png) **Mutant More Barebones is a resource pack inspired by the resource pack [Bare Bones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb), which makes the Minecraft world appear like it does in official Minecraft trailers and promo art. Mutant More Barebones does a very similar thing, it simplifies all the textures in the [Mutant More](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-mutant-more) mod to appear like the Minecraft trailers!** [Mutant More](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-mutant-more) must be installed for this resource pack to work. **Made By** **(All screenshots were taken using the [Bare Bones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bb) resource pack as well as Mutant More Barebones)** ### Want to host a server? **Need a server to play with friends but don't know how to set one up? BisectHosting has got you covered!** [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/eaeb688d-e438-4735-b89a-957a6d6ea1bb.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/alexandersfunandgames) **Just click on the picture above, select a plan, use my code alexandersfunandgames for 25% off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends!**
